creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(note to belagured re@ team: Do Not Open Until Christmas.)

While reviewing documentation on the website I noted that it claims that only FreeBSD 10 and 12 have available snapshots.  Ha ha I think, more stale documentation.  Let me pull up the link to prove that false.

ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/amd64/

Uh.

In the subdirectory, and as well all the others, there are snapshots for only 10 and 12.

I'm hoping that this is an artifact of branching 12, that was overlooked?
